raw_response_text:
<features>
- Clusters of bright orange to deep red-orange four-petaled flowers
- Visible green elongated foliage in the background
- Earthy, brown soil-like background
- Individual flowers have a tiny light-colored central petal spot
</features>
<kb>
- IF image contains clustered bright orange/reddish-orange four-petaled blooms with green foliage THEN class 45
- IF image contains purple bell-shaped clustered flowers THEN class 44
- IF image contains large pink/white layered lotus-style blooms with broad green leaves THEN class 77
</kb>
<rule_check>
The target image matches the first IF-THEN rule for class 45: it has clustered bright orange-to-red-orange four-petaled flowers paired with green foliage, exactly matching the visual pattern of the previously shown 45 class examples.
</rule_check>

<response>45</response>

- Symmetrical, layered broad pink flower petals
- Classic lotus bloom shape with radiating, tiered petals
- Green surrounding foliage/plant life
</features>
<kb>
- IF [symmetrical layered pink lotus-style flower with broad petals] THEN [77]
- IF [purple bell-shaped clustered flowers] THEN [44]
- IF [small orange/yellow clustered snapdragon-like blooms] THEN [45]
</kb>
<rule_check>

</rule_check>

<response>77</response>
